## Checklist
- [ ] Tests pass locally (`npm test`)
- [ ] Lint is clean (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] No new runtime dependency (or discussed in an issue first)
- [ ] Pure logic added under `lib/` is covered by a `test/<name>.test.js`
